name: DO & CO Aktiengesellschaft
summary: DO & CO Aktiengesellschaft provides catering services in Austria, Turkey, Great Britain, the United States, Germany, and internationally. It operates through three divisions: Airline Catering; International Event Catering; and Restaurants, Lounges & Hotel. The Airline Catering division offers airline catering services. The International Event Catering division provides event catering and infrastructure services. The Restaurants, Lounges & Hotel division engages in the operation of restaurants and Demel caf√É¬©s, lounges, hotels, and staff restaurants; and retail and airport gastronomy businesses. This segment also operates under H√É¬©diard, HENRY the art of living, and Aioli brands. DO & CO Aktiengesellschaft was founded in 1981 and is based in Vienna, Austria.
